title: senecio glaber
intro: Senecio glaber, also known as Smooth Fireweed or Groundsel, is a plant species native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Senecio glaber include its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. Senecio glaber can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
